title: FULLY FREE GLM-5.2 + Z-Code: This is ACTUALLY GOOD!
summary: Z Code is a new coding agent from Z AI built for GLM models, offering a free daily allowance of 5 million tokens. The tool provides Codex-like functionality with project generation, element inspection, DevTools access, and remote platform integration, though some features like file explorer and git initialization remain absent.
writeup: The video covers Z Code, a coding agent from Z AI designed for GLM models and paired here with GLM-5.2, including a free daily allowance of 5 million tokens. It walks through Codex-like capabilities: project generation, element inspection, DevTools access, and remote platform integration. The video also notes current gaps, specifically the absence of a file explorer and git initialization.
